title: IngestClaudeSummary
description: Final summary NDJSON line emitted by `ingest --mode claude-code`. Always the last line. Includes entity/relationship totals and cumulative LLM cost.

summary.description: Sentinel field; always true. Distinguishes this line from per-file events.

entities_total.description: Total entities extracted across all files.

rels_total.description: Total relationships extracted across all files.

cost_usd.description: Cumulative LLM cost in USD for the entire batch.
